properties.name: Open Upload Page
properties.description: User navigates to the upload section. System renders the file upload form with format hints and size constraints visible.

properties.assumption_note: Language selection optional at upload; auto-detect by ASR engine if omitted.
properties.name: Select File and Language Hint
properties.description: User picks a video file and optionally selects a language hint (RU or EN). If omitted, auto-detection is applied in BP-002.

properties.name: Validate File
properties.description: System checks file format (MP4/MKV/MOV) and size (max 500 MB). On failure, user gets inline error and may retry.

properties.name: Show Validation Error
properties.description: System displays inline error (unsupported format or size). User remains on upload page and may retry with a different file.

properties.name: Upload File in Chunks to Object Storage
properties.description: System transfers the validated video file to object storage (EXT-04) via chunked/multipart upload. Progress shown to user.

properties.name: Create Recording and UploadJob Records
properties.description: System persists a Recording entity (file metadata, storage path, language hint) and an UploadJob record, linking them.

properties.name: Enqueue Transcription Job
properties.description: System pushes a TranscriptionJob message to the async queue, referencing the Recording. Triggers BP-002.

properties.name: Show Upload Confirmation
properties.description: System shows "Upload complete, transcription is processing" with a link to the recording detail page.

properties.name: Dequeue transcription job
properties.description: Transcription worker polls the async job queue and dequeues the next pending job, extracting job ID, file reference, and language hint.

properties.name: Fetch video file from object storage
properties.description: Worker retrieves the raw video file from object storage (EXT-04) using the stored file reference. Streamed or downloaded to a working location.
